list.historyEntry: what rules should i have for progurard to keep all object with @Serializable
but if i use minify it will change package names and screw everything
where the fuck did you take the getCurrentNavigationRoute from?
jeez. i need to know tha active so i can tint the damn icon
then how the f i know which route i am to make my navigation bar?
but how could i get it as a NavigationRoute object?
how to get current navigation route?
it's an object not a class

I'm getting the following error while syncing my project. The error is: Unresolved reference: consumerProguardFiles
[Incubating] Problems report is available at: file:///home/lighttigerxiv/dev/personal/layout-scaffold/build/reports/problems/problems-report.html ``` e: file:///home/lighttigerxiv/dev/personal/layout-scaffold/layout-scaffold/build.gradle.kts:20:9: Unresolved reference: consumerProguardFiles
[Incubating] Problems report is available at: file:///home/lighttigerxiv/dev/personal/layout-scaffold/build/reports/problems/problems-report.html
``` How do I fix this?
but i don't want dynamic features. i just need to import my module
but i have them in settings gradle include ':app' include ':layout-scaffold'

I'm getting the following error while building my project. The error is: This application (com.lighttigerxiv.layoutscaffold) is not configured to use dynamic features ``` Execution failed for task ':app:processDebugResources'. > A failure occurred while executing com.android.build.gradle.internal.res.LinkApplicationAndroidResourcesTask$TaskAction > This application (com.lighttigerxiv.layoutscaffold) is not configured to use dynamic features. Please ensure dynamic features are configured in the build file. Refer to https://developer.android.com/guide/playcore/feature-delivery#base_feature_relationship
* Try: > Run with --info or --debug option to get more log output. > Run with --scan to get full insights. > Get more help at https://help.gradle.org. ... Caused by: java.lang.IllegalStateException: This application (com.lighttigerxiv.layoutscaffold) is not configured to use dynamic features. Please ensure dynamic features are configured in the build file. Refer to https://developer.android.com/guide/playcore/feature-delivery#base_feature_relationship at com.android.build.gradle.internal.res.LinkApplicationAndroidResourcesTask$TaskAction.run(LinkApplicationAndroidResourcesTask.kt:430) at com.android.build.gradle.internal.profile.ProfileAwareWorkAction.execute(ProfileAwareWorkAction.kt:74) ``` How do I fix this?

I'm getting the following error while syncing my project. The error is: SoftwareComponent with name 'release' not found ``` A problem occurred configuring project ':layout-scaffold'. > SoftwareComponent with name 'release' not found.
* Try: > Run with --info or --debug option to get more log output. > Run with --scan to get full insights. > Get more help at https://help.gradle.org.
* Exception is: org.gradle.api.ProjectConfigurationException: A problem occurred configuring project ':layout-scaffold'. ... Caused by: org.gradle.api.UnknownDomainObjectException: SoftwareComponent with name 'release' not found. at org.gradle.api.internal.DefaultNamedDomainObjectCollection.createNotFoundException(DefaultNamedDomainObjectCollection.java:530) at org.gradle.api.internal.DefaultNamedDomainObjectCollection.getByName(DefaultNamedDomainObjectCollection.java:359) at org.gradle.kotlin.dsl.NamedDomainObjectCollectionExtensionsKt.get(NamedDomainObjectCollectionExtensions.kt:401) at Build_gradle$3$1$1$1.invoke(build.gradle.kts:57) ``` How do I fix this?

I'm getting the following error while building my project. The error is: KSP failed with exit code: PROCESSING_ERROR ``` Execution failed for task ':app:kspDebugKotlin'. > A failure occurred while executing com.google.devtools.ksp.gradle.KspAAWorkerAction > KSP failed with exit code: PROCESSING_ERROR
* Try: > Run with --info or --debug option to get more log output. > Run with --scan to get full insights. > Get more help at https://help.gradle.org.
* Exception is: ... Caused by: java.lang.Exception: KSP failed with exit code: PROCESSING_ERROR at com.google.devtools.ksp.gradle.KspAAWorkerAction.execute(KspAATask.kt:643) at org.gradle.workers.internal.DefaultWorkerServer.execute(DefaultWorkerServer.java:63) at org.gradle.workers.internal.NoIsolationWorkerFactory$1$1.create(NoIsolationWorkerFactory.java:66) at org.gradle.workers.internal.NoIsolationWorkerFactory$1$1.create(NoIsolationWorkerFactory.java:62) ``` How do I fix this?
v% it's what i was thinking of
how to make it popup in center
how to make it unresizable
how to give it a 800x800 size
how to make this window float?
the touch was enough

I'm getting the following error while syncing my project. The error is: copyNonXmlValueResourcesForJvmMain task was failed: ``` $ ./gradlew :composeApp:copyNonXmlValueResourcesForJvmMain copyNonXmlValueResourcesForJvmMain task was failed: org.gradle.api.GradleException: Invalid Timestamp -2147483648000 for 'file '/home/lighttigerxiv/Downloads/xeeta/composeApp/src/jvmMain/composeResources/drawable''. at org.gradle.api.internal.file.AbstractFileTreeElement.validateTimeStamps(AbstractFileTreeElement.java:96) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.AbstractFileTreeElement.copyTo(AbstractFileTreeElement.java:78) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.copy.DefaultFileCopyDetails.copyTo(DefaultFileCopyDetails.java:137) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.copy.FileCopyAction$FileCopyDetailsInternalAction.processFile(FileCopyAction.java:49) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.copy.NormalizingCopyActionDecorator.maybeVisit(NormalizingCopyActionDecorator.java:104) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.copy.NormalizingCopyActionDecorator.lambda$execute$0(NormalizingCopyActionDecorator.java:71) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.copy.DuplicateHandlingCopyActionDecorator.lambda$execute$0(DuplicateHandlingCopyActionDecorator.java:71) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.copy.CopyFileVisitorImpl.processFile(CopyFileVisitorImpl.java:68) ``` How do I fix this?
